name: TopN
description: Aggregate if needed, ORDER BY metric DESC or ASC, then LIMIT N.
template_hint: SELECT dimension, metric FROM ... GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY metric DESC LIMIT N

name: 每组TopN
description: Use ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY group_dimension ORDER BY metric DESC) and filter rn = 1 or rn <= N.
template_hint: WITH ranked AS (SELECT ..., ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY group_col ORDER BY metric DESC) rn FROM ...) SELECT ... FROM ranked WHERE rn <= N

name: 环比增长
description: Aggregate each period first, then self-join or use LAG to compute period-over-period difference.
template_hint: WITH monthly AS (... GROUP BY month, dimension), diff AS (... current.metric - previous.metric ...) SELECT ...

name: 最新记录
description: Filter to the maximum effective date not later than the target date, often using a scalar subquery or ranked CTE.
template_hint: WHERE eff_start_dt = (SELECT MAX(eff_start_dt) FROM same_table WHERE eff_start_dt <= target_date AND keys match)

name: 事实表先聚合再JOIN
description: Aggregate large fact tables in a CTE before joining dimension tables when grouping by business names.
template_hint: WITH agg AS (SELECT key, SUM(metric) metric FROM fact GROUP BY key) SELECT dim.name, agg.metric FROM agg JOIN dim ...

name: 相关子查询
description: Use CTEs for global or monthly averages, then join/filter against the derived threshold.
template_hint: WITH base AS (...), threshold AS (... AVG(metric) ... GROUP BY period) SELECT ... FROM base JOIN threshold ...
